# Asset Structure

- `public/assets/logos` -> brand logos (svg/png/webp)
- `public/assets/cards` -> card artwork/images
- `public/assets/backgrounds` -> page/section backgrounds
- `public/assets/icons` -> custom icon files
- `public/assets/fonts` -> local webfonts
- `public/assets/ui` -> misc UI textures/illustrations
- `public/assets/exports` -> one-off exported site assets
- `src/assets/temp` -> temporary working files before final placement

Use in JSX with:
- `/assets/...` for files in `public/assets`
